tour.title: System Overview
tour.description: Start with the root README and project reports to understand the GoStay service map and recent security fixes.

tour.title: Identity and Security
tour.description: Review authentication, JWT, role bootstrap, and user profile APIs before following service-to-service calls.

tour.title: Catalog and Listing Domain
tour.description: Inspect the listing/catalog controllers, services, entities, and migrations that model the searchable travel inventory.

tour.title: Booking, Cart, Order, and Payment Flow
tour.description: Follow the transaction path from inventory availability through cart/order creation and payment/webhook completion.

tour.title: Gateway and Frontend
tour.description: End at the edge and UI layers to see how clients enter the system and call the backend services.
